_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell multiomics identifies clinically relevant mesenchymal stem-like cells and key regulators for MPNST malignancy.

_contextSnippet: we performed single-cell transcriptome profiling [single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq)] using the Drop-seq platform of a mouse MPNST model...16,240 cells from early-stage (1.5 months; n = 9085 cells) and advanced-stage (4 months; n = 7155 cells)
details: Successfully performed single-cell transcriptome profiling of mouse MPNST model with 16,240 cells from early-stage (9085 cells) and advanced-stage (7155 cells) tumors
